chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S-226 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 01.For orders on M.A.No.3520/2020 02.For orders on office objection “A” 03.For hearing of main case. 27-08-2020 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the applicant -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant would not press the disposal of instant application before this Court, if he is permitted to file a direct complaint of the incident before the Court having jurisdiction, and same if is filed to be disposed of irrespective of the findings already arrived at by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Order accordingly. J U D G E
